# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL Server"
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator login for the Azure SQL server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The password that will be used for SQL Server administrator access"
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "MyDatabase",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Azure SQL database to create."
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2017-10-01-preview",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "tags": {},
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "databases",
          "apiVersion": "2017-10-01-preview",
          "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
          "tags": {},
          "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
            "edition": "Basic",
            "maxSizeBytes": 2684354560
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net')]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    }
  }
}
